case_title: VICKTOR STEVENSON VS. GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEFF BURTON - GENERAL MANAGER, FILED BY DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GUS MARTINEZ - SHOP MANAGER, FILED BY DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEVENSON, VICKTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY STEVENSON, VICKTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEVENSON, VICKTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF VICKTOR STEVENSON AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVES JEFF BURTON & GUS MARTINEZ, GENERAL MANAGER AND SHOP MANAGER, RESPECTIVELY AT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVES WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
